title: Intense Spanish Mung Bean Empanadas
description: A kid-friendly Spanish dish featuring mung bean sprouts, with a smoky and slightly hot flavor, made in a bamboo steamer for a low-fat and healthy snack.
instructions: Preheat the bamboo steamer to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the mung bean sprouts, olive oil, and beaten egg to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of mung bean sprouts in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Place the empanadas in the bamboo steamer and cook for 15 minutes.
Serve the empanadas hot and enjoy.
